title: Resolve curvature-accounting condition: C5: J_curv unresolved current
description: Sector: J_curv. Allowed condition: J_curv remains unresolved until orientation, source side, boundary law, and mass neutrality are defined. Forbidden condition: J_curv is used as a curvature repair current or gradient-by-fiat. Consequence: J_curv cannot carry ordinary exterior mass while undefined..
